inputs.label: Free-stream Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The velocity of the fluid far from the boundary.

businessContext_i18n.en: The velocity of the fluid far from the boundary.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des Fluids fern der Grenzschicht.

inputs.label: Kinematic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Kinematic viscosity of the fluid (ν = μ/ρ).

businessContext_i18n.en: Kinematic viscosity of the fluid (ν = μ/ρ).

inputs.label: Distance from Leading Edge
inputs.businessContext: Distance along the surface from the leading edge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance along the surface from the leading edge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ön kenardan yüzey boyunca olan mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abstand entlang der Oberfläche von der Anströmkante.

inputs.label: Flow Regime (0=Laminar, 1=Turbulent)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 for laminar boundary layer, 1 for turbulent (using 1/7th power law).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 0 for laminar boundary layer, 1 for turbulent (using 1/7th power law).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Laminer sınır tabakası için 0, türbülanslı (1/7 kuvvet yasası) için 1 seçin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie 0 für laminare Grenzschicht, 1 für turbulent (mit 1/7-Potenzgesetz).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
